name: accounting firms processing 5–15 compliance filings/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 compliance filings/month, manual data entry causes late submissions. We automate data extraction and formatting instead of manual data entry and reporting tools.
problem_solved: Difficulty in consolidating data from multiple sources for compliance reporting.
